(The dive also surfaced **Physarum / slime-mold agent networks** as a genuinely never-used technique вҖ” banked to IDEAS as a future ADULT seed; too abstract for a 4yo and needs a GPU/Canvas trail-field renderer that this cycle's bans rule out.)   1. **Real stems (the headline).** The 7 synth voices are replaced by Karel's actual recordings via the public, anon, no-auth `/api/featured` (lists his featured album's track recording-ids + titles) вҶ’ `/api/audio/[id]` (signed URL per track) вҖ” the SAME path the loved `227-paths-granular`вқӨпёҸ / `163-paths-visualizer`вқӨпёҸ use. `loadStems()` picks the album whose name/artist matches `welcome|karel` (else first), spreads up to 7 tracks evenly, `Promise.allSettled`s per-track fetch вҶ’ `decodeAudioData`. Each becomes a looping `AudioBufferSource` вҶ’ lowpass (the blur/sharpen axis) вҶ’ breathing-LFO gain вҶ’ its own HRTF `PannerNode`. The arc now glides **`playbackRate` (detuned вҶ’ 1.0)** + **lowpass cutoff (вүҲ540 Hz вҶ’ вүҲ6 kHz)** instead of oscillator pitch вҖ” so each recording goes from a warbling, muffled distance to clear-and-true while orbiting inward: **you gather his album into a clear room around your head** (the *Forty Part Motet* of his own piano).
  2. **Haptics вҖ” a lab FIRST** (`navigator.vibrate`): a 26 ms buzz the instant a voice *you're facing* locks home (`progressвүҘ0.92 && swell>0.35`, latched once via `resolvedFired`), and a `[18,40,18]` triple-pulse when the whole room resolves.
  3. **Persistence** (`localStorage` key `resonance.dream.orbit-choir.gather.v1`): gather-progress is written ~every 4 s (monotonic); on return the idle button reads **"Return to the room"** + an emerald *"your room was N% gathered вҖ” it remembers"* note, and `startTimeRef` is offset so the arc **resumes** where it left off. "Begin again" + full resolve clear it.
- **Graceful fallback is load-bearing**: `<2` tracks decode (offline / private preview / CDN block / no featured album) вҶ’ reverts to the **original cycle-1 synth resolving-chord choir** with the full pitch-glide path intact; the top label states which source plays (`Karel's Welcome Home В· N voices` vs `synthesised choir (album offline)`). The synth code path is fully preserved, so a no-network sandbox still demos. Also added: a faced-voice **track-title** readout, a `loading` phase ("Gathering the roomвҖҰ"), and stem `src` nodes added to the teardown.
- **Ambition floor: 4/5** (need 2): `ambition: never-used-technique(#1) + вүҘ3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + multi-cycle(#4)`. **#1** вҖ” first `navigator.vibrate` HAPTIC output in 300+ prototypes AND first time a real audio *source* drives the spatial/HRTF layer. **#2** вҖ” DeviceOrientation head-tracker + N-voice HRTF panner scene + featured-album fetch/decode pipeline + convolver reverb + 360 s convergence state machine + localStorage room-memory (вүҲ6). **#3** вҖ” Janet Cardiff *The Forty Part Motet* (2001, touring 2026) + La Monte Young *Dream House* + Pauline Oliveros. **#4** вҖ” multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2 (it was claimed as a multi-cycle commitment in 308's README). (Honest: #5 not strictly claimed вҖ” В§309 is a path-(b)/(c) dive, not a <30-day frontier find; the four above already clear the floor 2Г—.)

## Cycle 308 вҖ” 2026-06-04 (UTC) вҖ” kids build В· WIDE (3 explorers) В· SHIPS `311-kids-music-box` вҖ” the lab's FIRST kids piece that REMEMBERS across sessions

**Git sync / env**: clean fire вҖ” `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..c2b8cd9` (HEAD = cycle 307 `308-orbit-choir`; the `jury: verdict 2026-06-04` commit also landed). **Research-first dive (this fire)** вҶ’ RESEARCH **В§308**: *reflexive interaction вҖ” a system that mirrors/varies the child's own input (Pachet's **Continuator**, 2002; Addessi's **MIROR** project) вҖ” is the validated way to make a kids music piece engaging WITHOUT a no-fail wash; it carries the experience on **memory + turn-taking**, not endless forgiving noodling.* Honest per JURY #5: a **path-(b)/(c)** dive (Continuator/MIROR are foundational; the only strictly-recent dated anchor is a Jan-2026 executive-function meta-analysis about *benefits*, not technique). The value is the **principle** вҖ” exactly the theory for discharging JURY #2 ("build a kids piece with memory or consequence"). Chain today's-research вҶ’ today's-build = **path (a)+(b)**: all three explorers implement "carry the kids experience on memory, not a no-fail bed"; the winner ships.

- **Action = Kid-cycle rotation (Decide priority #3)**: 308 % 2 = 0; no blocker; the queued adult 308-orbit-choir deepening is explicitly assigned to cycle 309 (an *adult* fire) by STATE В§307. STATE В§306/В§307 queued cycle 308 as the kids build (decide clap-band's fate / break the recipe). **JURY.md (2026-06-04) is decisive and governs**: provocation #2 вҖ” "**Break the kids recipe.** Five straight kids fires are 'new sensor вҶ’ no-fail modal bed.' Ban that form for one kids cycle: build a kids piece with **memory or consequence** вҖ” the child can make something *wrong* and fix it, or what they did *persists and grows*. `298-echo-friend` already pointed this way; nothing followed it." The JURY's banned set this cycle: **raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT В· phone-motion/orientation INPUT В· the new-sensorвҶ’no-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM В· C-major-pentatonic.** (Note: JURY #1 вҖ” deepen 308 with Karel's real piano stems вҖ” is explicitly "the next *adult* build" вҶ’ deferred to cycle 309.)
- **Mode: WIDE (3 explorers)** вҖ” cycle 307 was DEEP; alternation + the anti-similarity mandate вҶ’ WIDE. Three **distinct kids FORMS that all carry memory/consequence**, each dodging every banned tag: (309) Continuator/MIROR call-and-response **duet** (memory + turn-taking), (310) Simon-grows memory game with **real-but-kind right/wrong** (consequence), (311) rotating music-box **sequencer that persists to localStorage** (persists + grows). Pre-allocated 309/310/311; spawned 3 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). None touched git or shared docs; none needed an API route (pure client-side Web Audio + Canvas2D/three.js + localStorage; no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets вҶ’ no `guard`).
- **Curation вҶ’ WINNER `311-kids-music-box`**: I verified from the **actual code + READMEs + the authoritative build**, not builder self-reports (309/310 builders again mis-reported some helper files as "pre-existing" вҖ” the recurring memory artifact; code is genuinely theirs, created 14:08вҖ“14:11 during the run). **Why 311 won**: (a) 309 and 310 are *both* Canvas2D-creature-with-pads pieces вҖ” the lab's over-represented form (JURY: 13/15 outputs to a screen, mostly the same way); 311 is the only candidate that breaks that pattern with a **3D physical-object metaphor** AND dodges the banned fragment-shader monoculture. (b) It's the **"massively bigger" pick** per Karel's standing mandate вҖ” a *composition machine* the child builds, not a reactive toy. (c) **localStorage persistence is a genuine lab-first for kids** вҖ” no kids prototype has ever remembered state across sessions; it hits JURY #2's "*what they did persists and grows*" verbatim. The curating fire also fixed a real **pluck-alignment bug** (comb angle a quarter-turn off the visible comb) + two TS `Float32Array<ArrayBuffer>` generic mismatches before validating. 309 (tightest research chain) + 310 (most literal "wrong and fix it") banked as strong ship-ready seeds.
- **Ambition floor: 3/5** (need 2): `ambition: вүҘ3-subsystems(#2) + named-reference(#3) + recent-research(#5)`. **#2** вҖ” KS audio engine + three.js/r3f 3D scene + per-frame sequencer clock + localStorage persistence = 4 subsystems. **#3** вҖ” Swiss cylinder musical box (c.1796, Geneva) + Karplus-Strong (1983). **#5** вҖ” RESEARCH В§308 (reflexive interaction), added this fire. (Honest: KS isn't a lab-first technique вҖ” used in 303/105 вҖ” so #1 not claimed; persistence-across-sessions is arguably a lab-first but counted under the cleaner #2/#3/#5.)
- **Diversity audit** (last 10 shipped/banked: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306,308 + banked 304/305; JURY's explicit bans this cycle): `diversity: banned=[raw-WebGL2-fragment-shader OUTPUT В· phone-motion/orientation INPUT В· no-fail-modal-noodle KIDS FORM В· C-major-pentatonic] В· picked(311)=[touch-slot INPUT В· three.js-3D-object OUTPUT В· physical-sequencer + Karplus-Strong + localStorage-persistence TECHNIQUE В· warm-toy/craft kids VIBE В· D-Lydian-hexachord]`. Dodges every banned tag вҖ” and the winner specifically breaks the Canvas2D-creature form its own two siblings shared.
- **Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved, unchanged set): the loop/memory + tactile/craft cluster pulls here вҖ” `172-loop-station`вқӨпёҸ, `160-kids-paint-loop`вқӨпёҸ, `169-kids-marble-run`вқӨпёҸ (loop/memory), `105-pluck-field`вқӨпёҸ (the physical-pluck/Karplus timbre 311 uses), `111-kids-shape-loop`вқӨпёҸ, `100-kids-paint-song`вқӨпёҸ. No single love forced the pick; kid-rotation + JURY #2 + the ambition/diversity gates governed.

**What shipped (`311-kids-music-box`)**: a near-black warm screen; tap **Start** (resumes AudioContext, loads the saved tune or seeds a simple D-Lydian one so the box is already singing). A slowly-rotating 3D **music-box cylinder** (three.js via @react-three/fiber): wooden barrel + brass caps, a fixed color-coded **comb** that plucks each pin as it rolls past, raised colored **pin studs** that "pop"+glow on pluck. Grid = 14 time-steps around the circumference Г— 6 pitch-rows along the length; **tap a front-face slot** to add/remove a pin (front-face-only via a surface-normalВ·camera test on an invisible hit-grid kept in lockstep with the body). The pin pattern **persists to `localStorage`** (try/catch degrade), so the loop keeps playing while the child rearranges it and the box **remembers across reloads** вҖ” the whole point. Audio = **Karplus-Strong** plucked tones (one KS-rendered `AudioBuffer` per pitch: filtered noise burst вҶ’ tuned delay line with lowpass-averaging feedback вҶ’ A/R envelope), fired as cheap `BufferSource`s through a synthesized convolver reverb + a `DynamicsCompressor` limiter + 0.55 master so dense patterns stay safe. **D Lydian hexachord** (D E F# G# A B вҖ” NOT C-major-pentatonic). Controls: рҹ§№ Start fresh (clear), вҸё Hold / в–¶ Spin. No-reading (colors = notes, studs = melody; a tiny caption for the grown-up). Fallbacks: no WebGL вҶ’ `text-rose-300` notice; no Web Audio вҶ’ notice, box still spins. Audio disposed on unmount. Kids В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 4.74 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: KS timbre by ear (per-row brightness/damping), tap accuracy + felt pluck timing on a real touch device, three.js disposal across a live unmount.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) вҶ’ moved 309 + 310 to `/tmp/dream-losers/` вҶ’ authoritative `npm run build` with **only 311 present** вҶ’ **exit 0**, `/dream/311-kids-music-box в—Ӣ (Static) 4.74 kB` (347 kB First Load JS вҖ” the three.js/r3f bundle, expected for a 3D piece), all 339 static pages generated. **No fix attempts needed** (the builder had already fixed the pluck-alignment + TS-generic issues). Zero warnings/errors attributable to 311; remaining warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code.

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 309 (adult) вҖ” JURY #1, the headline: DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems.** The non-screen spatial thread is the freshest thing the lab owns and the README already specs it: (a) replace synth voices with his real piano stems via `/api/audio/[id]` (the standing "use his actual music" directive has NEVER reached the spatial layer), (b) `navigator.vibrate` haptic pulse when a faced voice resolves (first haptic output), (c) localStorage persistence of how far you'd gathered the room. This is multi-cycle thread #3 reaching cycle 2.
- **Cycle 310 (kids): ship a banked memory/consequence sibling** вҖ” `310-kids-sing-back` (Simon-grows, real-but-kind right/wrong вҖ” the cleanest "make something wrong and fix it") OR `309-kids-echo-duet` (Continuator duet) вҖ” both build-verified this fire. Continue breaking the recipe (JURY #2); do NOT regress to a sensor-noodle.
- **Standing breadth still unshipped**: real-world-data sonification (JURY #3 вҖ” RESEARCH В§289 seismic, only 1 entry and it's kids+pentatonic); AI-pipeline-chain embedded in AV (JURY #4 вҖ” RESEARCH В§285, Karel's explicit directive, ZERO in last 15); `282-ensemble-tabs` (first networked/BroadcastChannel, never shipped).
- **Housekeeping (open since 269)**: INDEX "Newest/Previous/Earlier/Older" chain is getting deep + STATE ordering is mixed; worth a reconcile in a polish cycle.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** вҖ” pure client-side Web Audio + three.js + localStorage; no mic, camera, network, or secrets. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile; three/@react-three were already in package.json вҖ” package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- **WIDE-3 orchestration = the portfolio choreography**: planner sets 3 distinct briefs (3 memory/consequence FORMS) вҶ’ 3 parallel folder-isolated makers вҶ’ critic reads the actual code + READMEs + runs the authoritative build + enforces taste/diversity (shipped the one that breaks the form its siblings shared) вҶ’ curator ships one validated winner + 2 ready-to-revive seeds. ## Cycle 307 вҖ” 2026-06-04 (UTC) вҖ” adult build В· DEEP (2 approaches) В· SHIPS `308-orbit-choir` вҖ” the lab's FIRST non-screen / audio-first spatial piece

**Git sync / env**: clean this fire вҖ” `git fetch && checkout main && pull --ff-only` fast-forwarded `2e98f5e..015d8c8` (HEAD = cycle 306 `306-kids-rain-shaker`); NO force-push divergence (2nd clean sync running). On-disk **AGENT.md was the current full 385-line version** (AMBITION & DIVERSITY + MULTI-AGENT ORCHESTRATION present) вҖ” the recurring stale-AGENT drift did NOT recur. `node_modules` shipped absent вҶ’ `npm ci` before the authoritative build. Worked directly on main; scoped `git add` to `docs/dreams/` + `src/app/dream/308-orbit-choir/`. Highest committed folder = 306; pre-allocated **307/308** to the two DEEP builders (collision-free on disk). Winner shipped as `308-orbit-choir`; loser `307-still-room` removed after curation and banked to IDEAS.

**Research-first dive (this fire)** вҶ’ RESEARCH **В§307**: *head MOVEMENT (not position) is what makes generic browser-HRTF legible* вҖ” arXiv:2510.09161 (HRTF individualisation + head movements). Empirically, active head-turning collapses the front/back & in-head confusions that Web Audio's generic `panningModel="HRTF"` suffers вҖ” so the cheap generic browser HRTF becomes legible **iff the listener turns**, which is exactly what a phone's `DeviceOrientation` already affords. The build's core gesture IS the disambiguator. Chain today's-research вҶ’ today's-build = **path (a)+(c)**: implements В§295's un-spent head-tracked-spatial shelf.

- **Action = banked adult breadth (Decide priority #4, JURY-directed pivot)**: 307 % 2 = 1 вҶ’ adult. STATE В§305/В§306 queued cycle 307 as *Mirror-Canon CYCLE 3 polish* **only if the thread still feels alive after 3 cycles; else pivot to banked adult breadth*. I pivoted вҖ” the Mirror-Canon thread (303 ship + 305 deepen) has demonstrated the multi-cycle commitment the JURY asked for; a 3rd polish fire would be incremental. **JURY.md (2026-06-03) is decisive and points elsewhere**: provocation #3 ("the lab has banked three spatial/non-screen pieces and shipped ZERO вҖ” resurrect one and SHIP it"), #4 ("build on the unused half of RESEARCH В§295 вҖ” the head-tracked-spatial-audio finding that produced `still-room`, banked not shipped"), #5 ("for one cycle, ban the audioвҶ’visual driver entirely вҖ” build something whose output isn't a screen visualizer"). All three resolve to the same banked piece. This is "ship the breadth you've already paid for."
- **Mode: DEEP (2 approaches to one concept)** вҖ” concept = the lab's first audio-FIRST / non-screen HRTF spatial room navigated by head-turn. Approach A = `307-still-room` (faithful Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*: 7 fixed-bearing voices, turn to tune in). Approach B = `308-orbit-choir` (the same spatial foundation given a **6-minute long-form, stateful convergence arc** вҖ” voices orbit inward + glide from a detuned cluster into a warm A-minor-add9 chord; you shepherd voices home by facing them). Pre-allocated 307/308; spawned 2 folder-isolated Builder subagents **in parallel** (single message). Neither touched git or shared docs; neither needed an API route (pure Web Audio + `DeviceOrientation`, no mic, no camera, no network, no secrets вҶ’ no `guard`).
- **Curation вҶ’ WINNER `308-orbit-choir`**: 308 is the strict superset вҖ” it contains everything still-room does (HRTF room + DeviceOrientation listener-rotation + faced-voice swell + Deep-Listening framing) **plus** the long-form/stateful arc the JURY explicitly craves ("different at minute 6 than minute 0"), which fills the categorical-menu's *long-form generative (5+ min, state/memory/evolution)* gap the lab is thin on. Both built clean (full `npm run build` with both present = exit 0; each agent reported clean tsc + ESLint). Removed `307-still-room`, re-ran the **authoritative build winner-only = exit 0** (`/dream/308-orbit-choir` 3.92 kB). `307-still-room` banked to IDEAS as the calmer fixed-room sibling.
- **Ambition floor: 4/5** вҖ” `#1 never-used technique` (FIRST HRTF spatial-audio output + FIRST `DeviceOrientation` listener-rotation in 300+ prototypes вҖ” the lab has avoided HRTF for 300 cycles; grep INDEX = 0 shipped spatial pieces despite 3 banked) В· `#2 вүҘ3 subsystems` (DeviceOrientation head-tracker + HRTF panner graph + 7-voice synth scene + synthesized convolver reverb + a 6-min azimuth+pitch convergence state machine = 4-5) В· `#3 named reference` (La Monte Young *Dream House*, Гүliane Radigue, Pauline Oliveros *Deep Listening*) В· `#5 recent research` (RESEARCH В§307 / В§295, this fire + within-14-days). Recorded `ambition: novel-technique(#1) + вүҘ3-subsystems(#2) + named-ref(#3) + recent-research(#5)`.
- **Diversity audit** (last 10: 290,291,293,295,298,302,303,306 + banked 304/305): over-represented = kids VIBE (5Г—: 290/293/295/298/303/306), tilt/deviceorientation-orientation INPUT (290/293/303/306), matte-Canvas2D + raw-WebGL OUTPUT (most). `diversity: banned=[kids-vibe, tilt-orientation-input, matte-canvas/webgl-visual-output, pentatonic] В· picked=[adult-meditative VIBE В· device-orientation-HEADING-as-listener-rotation INPUT (a NEW use of the sensor вҖ” rotates the audio listener, not a screen object) В· pure-spatial-HRTF-audio OUTPUT (screen is a faint footnote вҖ” the FIRST build whose output is not a screen visualizer) В· long-form-convergence + HRTF TECHNIQUE]`. Directly executes JURY #5 ("ban the audioвҶ’visual driver") вҖ” this is the lab's first piece where sound is the content and the screen is the footnote.
- **Love signal**: votes API shows loved spatial/immersive pieces вҖ” `148-spatial-palette` вқӨпёҸ, `107-ocean-presence` вқӨпёҸ, `227-paths-granular` вқӨпёҸ, `130-tsl-particle-compute` вқӨпёҸ. No shipped HRTF piece existed to love; this is the first. Pulled toward the immersive-room direction those loves imply.

**What shipped (`308-orbit-choir`)**: near-black audio-first screen; tap "Begin the orbit" (resumes AudioContext + requests iOS `DeviceOrientationEvent.requestPermission()` in the same gesture). 7 sustained HRTF-panned voices start scattered + detuned into a soft cluster; over a 360s eased scheduler they orbit inward to an even ring **and** their pitches glide (`setTargetAtTime`) into a warm **A natural-minor add9 / stacked-fifth** chord вҖ” so spatial field and harmony resolve together. `DeviceOrientation.alpha` rotates the `AudioListener` (modern `forwardX/Z`+`positionX/Y/Z` AudioParams AND legacy `setOrientation`/`setPosition` both feature-detected for Safari/old-Chrome); facing a voice swells it and floors its personal resolution forward, so you *shepherd voices home* and shape the pace. Synthesized convolver reverb (decaying filtered-noise impulse, no files). Fallback chain: sensor вҶ’ pointer-drag вҶ’ arrow keys вҶ’ hands-free auto-tour, with a readable `text-rose-300` notice when the sensor's inactive (separate notice if Web Audio is absent). Thin violet progress ring + `M:SS вҖ” state` label (`scattered вҶ’ drifting in вҶ’ gathering вҶ’ almost home вҶ’ resolved`) + "Begin again" hold state + a faint violet orbital-map canvas (guide, not the point). Full ref-based teardown on unmount. Headphones hint (HRTF needs binaural). Adult В· zero new deps В· zero API route В· no guard В· 3.92 kB. **Build-verified, not browser-verified** вҖ” unverified: whether generic Web-Audio HRTF externalizes convincingly on a real phone + headphones (the whole bet rides on this), whether the 6-min arc reads as "arrival" vs. a slow wash, the shepherding feel, and front/back disambiguation on a real DeviceOrientation stream.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** вҖ” pure Web Audio + `DeviceOrientation`, all client-side; no mic, no camera, no recording, no network, no secrets. Within the scope fence. **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile only; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- The design-notes link points at `/dream/308-orbit-choir/README.md` (lab convention вҖ” App Router won't serve README as a route, so the link 404s; carried, matches prior prototypes, not a build blocker вҖ” worth a future `_shared` notes-viewer).

**What's queued next**:
- **Cycle 308 (kids)**: 308 % 2 = 0 вҶ’ kids. **DECIDE `304-kids-clap-band`'s fate** вҖ” now thrice-banked (strongest-floor rhythm lane but keeps losing on experience): either ship it outright (the missing rhythm/percussion lane; pairs with 298 pitch / 303 tilt / 306 shake) or deliberately retire it. `305-kids-blow-sail` (calm breath) also available. Must dodge JURY's kids bans (touch-input + matte-canvas + pentatonic-poke).
- **Cycle 309+ (adult): DEEPEN `308-orbit-choir` (multi-cycle thread #3)** вҖ” the README's three deepenings: (a) replace synth voices with Karel's real *Welcome Home* piano stems (the standing "use his actual music" directive), (b) `navigator.vibrate` haptic pulse the instant a faced voice reaches full resolution (first haptic output), (c) `localStorage` persistence so the room remembers how far you'd gathered it across sessions. OR ship the banked `307-still-room` (faithful fixed-room Deep Listening sibling) as a calmer companion. OR remaining banked breadth: `282-ensemble-tabs` (first networked/BroadcastChannel вҖ” JURY #3, still never shipped).
- **Mirror-Canon thread**: parked at cycle 2 (`302`); its planned cycle-3 polish is deferred in favor of opening the spatial thread. Revivable if a vote signal asks.

## Cycle 305 вҖ” 2026-06-04 (UTC) вҖ” adult build В· DEEPEN (solo) В· Mirror-Canon CYCLE 2 вҖ” folds RoundвҮ„Phase into `302-mirror-canon-round`

Followed the mandate as carried in the cycle brief. Flagged again in MORNING вҖ” worth pinning AGENT.md from Karel's side.

**Research-first**: this build chains directly off **RESEARCH В§303** (the Mirror-Canon DEEP fire's dive: loop-pedal one-person-choir + canon/round tradition + **Steve Reich phasing** + Daniel Rozin *Wooden Mirror*) вҖ” the same dive that produced cycle 303's `302` and its banked phasing sibling `301-mirror-canon-phase`. No new research dive this fire (research-first rule **path (b)**: a recent dive is still the load-bearing idea, < 2 cycles old; cycle 303's STATE + 302's README both spec'd this exact cycle-2 step). Steve Reich *Piano Phase* (1967) is the named anchor the phasing law `(1 + nВ·0.012)` implements.

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): no Mirror-Canon slug is loved yet, but the **loop/memory + embodied/body cluster** points squarely here вҖ” `172-loop-station`вқӨпёҸ, `160-kids-paint-loop`вқӨпёҸ, `169-kids-marble-run`вқӨпёҸ (loop/memory), `217-dance-avatar`вқӨпёҸ, `234-kids-hand-creature`вқӨпёҸ, `104-kids-mirror-draw`вқӨпёҸ, `101-camera-song`вқӨпёҸ (body/camera). The phase-cloud "your selves slipping apart, never repeating" deepens this evolving-loop-of-you vein. No single love forced the pick; the queued multi-cycle thread + JURY #1 governed.

**Decide вҖ” gates cleared**:
- **Action = Continue/Deepen (Decide priority #2)**: cycle 304's STATE explicitly queued **cycle 305 = Mirror-Canon CYCLE 2 вҖ” fold `301`'s Steve Reich phasing engine into `302` as a RoundвҮ„Phase mode toggle**, and `302`'s own README lists it as the designated cycle-2 deepening with the exact drift law. 305 % 2 = 1 вҶ’ adult, matching `302`'s lane. This advances the lab's **2nd multi-cycle thread** (after 291-harmonograph) вҖ” the direct discharge of the JURY's #1 standing provocation ("stop shipping orphans; pick ONE thing and deepen it over 2вҖ“3 cycles; `287` is the candidate").
- **Mode: solo (deepen-in-place)** вҖ” not WIDE/DEEP orchestration. The cycle-2 spec is a single, fully-defined change (the phasing engine already designed in the banked `301` sibling), so there is no "2 orthogonal approaches" to explore; the absolute is *don't break Karel's app*, and a single fully-controlled deepening of an already-build-verified piece is the most reliable green-deploy. (Cycles 293/294 set the solo-when-safer precedent.)

  - **(#4) Multi-cycle commitment** вҖ” cycle 2 of the Mirror-Canon thread (the lab's 2nd genuine multi-cycle build); cyc303 birth вҶ’ cyc305 phasing вҶ’ cyc306+ polish. Headline.
  - **(#3) Named reference** вҖ” **Steve Reich, *Piano Phase* (1967)** drives the new phasing law, on top of 287/302's carried Rozin/round/Frippertronics/Oliveros/LUMIA lineage (all real/checkable).

  - (#2 вүҘ3-subsystems) вҖ” 302 already has 4; not double-counted as this cycle's novelty.
  - (#5 recent-research) вҖ” NOT claimed this fire (no new <30-day dive; path-(b) reuse of В§303).
- **Diversity audit** (last-10 shipped {285,286,287,290,291,293,295,298,302,303}; standing JURY over-rep = touch INPUT В· three.js OUTPUT В· matte-Canvas2D OUTPUT В· pentatonic-poke TECHNIQUE В· kids VIBE): `diversity: action=continue-multi-cycle-build В· picked(302-cyc2)=[camera/body INPUT В· matte-wooden-mirror OUTPUT (thread-continuity) В· phasing/Reich canon-memory TECHNIQUE (NEW axis) В· adult/embodied/ritual VIBE]`. **Honest flag:** OUTPUT = matte-Canvas2D wooden mirror IS the over-represented output вҖ” **justified as the mandate's explicit carve-out for continuing a multi-cycle ambitious build** (the Rozin mirror is 287/302's structural signature). The NEW axis carrying the gate is the phasing TECHNIQUE; INPUT (camera/body, not touch), TECHNIQUE, and VIBE (adult, not kids) all dodge the bans.

**What I built (1 commit, deepen-in-place)**:
- **Round вҮ„ Phase mode toggle** in `302-mirror-canon-round/page.tsx`. Added `CanonMode` + `mode`/`modeRef` state, a `committedAtS` field on each `CanonVoice` (the per-voice drift origin), and `PHASE_DRIFT = 0.012`. Playback step 5 now branches: **Round** = the existing locked `barPhase вҲ’ offset`; **Phase** = each voice loops at `BAR_SECВ·(1 + iВ·PHASE_DRIFT)`, clocked from its own commit time, so voice 0 stays locked and later voices slip вҖ” Steve Reich *Piano Phase*. The round literally never repeats in Phase.
- **Live drift HUD** вҖ” one tinted marker per active voice showing its current loop position (0..1), throttled to ~10 fps via a frame counter (cheap; the canvas keeps its own rAF). In Round the markers hold fixed offsets; in Phase they slide apart вҖ” a legible read of the phasing even on Karel's phone.
- A segmented Round/Phase toggle button (44px targets, violet active), mode-aware helper copy, hero + footer updated (added the Reich reference), and the README's multi-cycle section marked cycle 2 **shipped** with cycle 3 (on-hardware tuning + per-voice drift-rate sculpt) queued.

**Validate**: `npm ci` (exit 0) вҶ’ `npm run build`: **вң“ Compiled successfully in 26.7s**, `/dream/302-mirror-canon-round в—Ӣ (Static) 7.51 kB` (was 6.89 kB cyc303), 338/338 static pages generated, exit 0. **No fix attempts needed.** All build warnings are pre-existing non-dream Resonance code (RotateCcw, journey.id, fontsвҖҰ), **zero attributable to 302**. Build-verified, **not** browser-verified (no camera/GPU in the sandbox).

- **Cycle 306 (kids)**: ship `299-kids-clap-band` (clap вҶ’ HFC-onset-detection layered groove, Steve Reich *Clapping Music* вҖ” strongest-floor, build-verified, pairs as a sibling to 298's pitch lane + 303's tilt lane) OR `300-kids-blow-sail` (calm breath lane, Wiener-entropy breath/tone discriminator). Both build-verified, full specs in IDEAS.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard`** вҖ” Web Audio + camera (getUserMedia, analysis-only, never recorded/uploaded) + MediaPipe model from jsDelivr CDN (read-only) + Canvas2D, all client-side. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). **No new npm deps** (`npm ci` from the existing lockfile only; package.json/lock untouched + excluded from the commit).
- **Honesty carry-forward**: 302 cyc2 is **build-verified, not browser-verified**. Unverified surface: (a) the *feel* of `PHASE_DRIFT = 0.012` on real hardware вҖ” too small and the phasing reads as static over a review-length listen, too large and it sounds out-of-sync rather than phasing (a one-number tweak next fire, never an error); (b) whether the phase cloud reads as "my selves slipping apart" vs. a wash at 4 stacked formant voices through the limiter; (c) whether the ~10 fps drift HUD looks smooth enough to read the slip; (d) carried вҖ” MediaPipe CDN reliability + the ghost-fallback auto-commit selling the concept at 06:30 (the ghost auto-commits 2 voices so Phase mode demos itself with no camera). All fail safe: the always-on pad keeps it alive, the toggle defaults to Round (the proven cyc1 behaviour), and the build is green.
- **Force-push doc-drift persists** (origin/main force-updated AGAIN; local diverged 50/50; `git reset --hard origin/main`). Harmless to the loop but recurring every fire вҖ” flagged again in MORNING.

Chain dive вҶ’ build is direct (research-first path (a)): В§293 вҶ’ `285-mosaic-listener`.

**Decided**: Adult cycle (293 % 2 = 1). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The queue named `mosaic-listener` as **"the strongest single bank in the queue вҖ” schedule it on the next clean-slate adult cycle,"** and this is that cycle. **Rejected the other queued candidates after a prior-art grep**: `5-arcs` ("Journey Arc Engine v2") + `48-arc-compose` **already implement an "EDM Build-and-Drop" / cinematic / ritual arc**, so the journey-engine-alternative direction would be a near-duplicate (the exact "too similar" trap the mandate bans); `271-pigment-mosaic` already shipped the **AI-image-inside-AV** piece (Karel's #1, no longer a 0Г— gap, and the FAL_KEY/no-browser-verify risk is real for an autonomous cycle). `mosaic-listener` is the clean clear-slate pick: a genuinely new synthesis paradigm + bullseye on the "use his real piano" directive.

**Mode**: **solo** (not WIDE/DEEP orchestration). Deliberate: the absolute rule is *the build must pass / don't break Karel's app*, and a single fully-controlled, fully-build-verified piece is the most reliable green-deploy path in budget вҖ” especially with **raw WebGL2** shaders I can't browser-verify this cycle. Made the piece rich (4 subsystems) to honor the "not a thin solo toy" spirit. (Cycle 290 set this solo precedent and it held.)

**Ambition floor** вҖ” cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-references(verified) + вүҘ3-subsystems + recent-research(В§293)`
- **(1) Novel technique** вҖ” grepped INDEX + all dream READMEs for `concatenative`/`corpus-based`/`catart`/`audio mosaic`/`timbre-space`: **zero hits вҶ’ first concatenative-synthesis / audio-mosaicing piece in 280+ prototypes.** (`227-paths-granular` is *granular* playback of a single source position; this is *descriptor-matched KNN concatenation* across a tagged corpus вҖ” a different paradigm.)
- **(3) Named references (verified)** вҖ” README cites CataRT/Diemo Schwarz, The Concatenator (arXiv 2411.04366, 2024), MACAT/MACataRT (arXiv 2502.00023, 2025), FluCoMa вҖ” all real & checkable.
- **(2) вүҘ3 subsystems** вҖ” 4: corpus analysis (grain segmentation + RMS + 256-pt Hann-DFT spectral centroid + ZCR pitch, with synth-corpus *and* real-track-decode paths sharing one buffer-index playback) В· descriptor-space KNN matcher + Chris-Wilson look-ahead grain scheduler (overlap-add windowed BufferSources вҶ’ lowpass вҶ’ feedback-delay wash вҶ’ limiter) В· matte WebGL2 atlas render (GL_POINTS, per-grain activation, cursor + trail) В· target navigation (pointer-drag / auto-drift Lissajous / mic centroid+RMS).
- **(5) Recent research** вҖ” built directly off this cycle's В§293 dive.
- (4) Multi-cycle вҖ” not claimed; shipped demoable in one fire (deepen path in README: YIN+MFCC, PCA/UMAP layout, KD-tree, onset-aligned grains, MACataRT factor-oracle).

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 267,268,271,272,275,276,279,280,283,284):
`diversity: banned=[canvas2d-output(5Г—: 271,272,275,279,280) В· three.js-additive-points/glow(JURY hard-ban) В· C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] В· picked=[pointer-drag INPUT (mic optional) В· matte raw-WebGL2 OUTPUT В· concatenative-synthesis TECHNIQUE(0Г— ever) В· data-sculpture/his-piano VIBE В· his-real-piano-grains SOUND (non-pentatonic by source)]`

Touch-tap was 3Г— (268,272,284), under the line.

**What's new about this prototype**:

Also pre-empted two known traps before the first build: removed an unused CPU `hsv` helper (color is done in GLSL), and swapped an O(NВ·lag) autocorrelation pitch detector for a cheap O(N) zero-crossing estimate + a dynamic analysis hop, so slicing a multi-minute real track stays sub-second. Mic is analysis-only (`AnalyserNode`, never connected to destination, never recorded/persisted/transmitted). Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). ## Cycle 292 вҖ” kids build (WIDE orchestration, 3 explored) вҖ” 284-kids-thunder-drum

**When**: 2026-06-03 ~06:15 UTC (every-2h autonomous cycle).

**Git sync**: origin/main had been **force-updated** again (local main diverged 50/50 on fetch; shallow clone вҶ’ `--ff-only` aborts). Reset local `main --hard origin/main` вҶ’ HEAD `4e13376` (cycle 291, `283-piano-isosurface`). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` ABSENT вҶ’ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative builds. Highest committed folder = **283** вҶ’ pre-allocated **284/285/286** for the three builders (no collision).

**Love signal** (`/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): for a kids cycle the relevant pull is the **embodied / sensorimotor + non-standard-instrument** cluster вҖ” `83-kids-tilt-rain`вқӨпёҸ, `140-kids-string-bridge`вқӨпёҸ, `133-kids-ripple-pond`вқӨпёҸ, `105-pluck-field`вқӨпёҸ (its KS/physical-pluck timbre), `166-kids-lantern`вқӨпёҸ. The winner (strike a real drum *skin* and feel its physics) sits in this "the instrument is a physical thing you act on, not a button" vein, and is the deepest answer yet to the standing JURY "audit the SOUND" mandate.

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH В§292, 2026-06-03 вҖ” web tools healthy): **real-time physical-modeling / modal synthesis**. Anchor: *nlm: Real-Time Non-linear Modal Synthesis in Max* (**arXiv 2603.10240, March 2026**) вҖ” playable real-time modal synthesis of strings, **membranes, and plates**, with non-linear (tension/amplitude-dependent) behavior. Foundational cross-refs: circular-membrane **Bessel modes** (Rayleigh, *Theory of Sound*, 1877), tympani **tension-nonlinearity pitch-glide** (Morrison & Rossing), **stick-slip friction** excitation (InГЎcio/Antunes/Wright 2008), mass-spring/Verlet **soft-body** (Provot 1995 / MГјller PBD). Surprise/hook: the lab has 130+ kids instruments but their voice is almost always a **Karplus pluck / triangle bell / additive sine in C-major pentatonic** вҖ” and modal synthesis attacks that at the root: you choose a *physical object*, and its eigenmodes are inharmonic/**non-pentatonic by physics**, with a body-level "hit harder вҶ’ it bends" intuition a 4-yo already has. Grep confirmed the gap: cymatics (`19`,`165`) only *draw* Chladni/Bessel (visualizers, not playable); Karplus is waveguide *strings*; **zero playable membrane/plate modal synths, zero friction/stick-slip, zero mass-springвҶ’audio** in the lab. Chain dive вҶ’ build is direct: В§292 вҶ’ three WIDE briefs (membrane / bowl / jelly) вҶ’ shipped `284-kids-thunder-drum` (research-first rule path (a)).

**Decided**: Kids cycle (292 % 2 = 0). No blocker, nothing in-progress. The standing JURY (2026-06-02) demand is *"audit the SOUND вҖ” the most monotonous axis; force a non-pentatonic mode; ban the glow/pentatonic."* Recent kids fires broadened the *tuning* (slendro `268`, JI-beating `272`, BohlenвҖ“Pierce `276`, Lydian `280`) вҖ” this cycle goes one level deeper and broadens the **synthesis method itself** (physical modeling), where the non-pentatonic pitches fall out of the physics rather than a chosen scale. The live **diversity audit BANS canvas2d-output (5Г—)**, so all three briefs use non-canvas2d output.

**Mode**: **WIDE** (research anchor opened three orthogonal physical objects; JURY "audit/diversify the sound" вҶ’ go WIDE with fresh tags; alternation: 288 WIDE вҶ’ 290 WIDE вҶ’ 291 WIDE вҶ’ keep diversifying since the jury is still flagging convergence, not asking to DEEPEN one piece). Three briefs = three physical objects Г— three never-used techniques Г— three non-canvas2d outputs, all non-pentatonic:
- `284-kids-thunder-drum` вҖ” **touch strike** В· **three.js** Bessel-mode membrane mesh В· **non-linear modal membrane synthesis** (tension pitch-glide). **вҶҗ WINNER.**
- `285-kids-singing-bowl` вҖ” **touch circular-rub** В· **three.js** metallic bowl + cymatic water В· **friction/stick-slip modal excitation** (sustain-by-gesture).
- `286-kids-jelly-choir` вҖ” **touch poke/squish** В· **inline SVG** wobble blobs В· **mass-spring/Verlet soft-body вҶ’ audio** (JI harmony).

**Ambition floor** вҖ” winner cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-reference + вүҘ3-subsystems + recent-research(В§292)`
- **(1) Novel technique** вҖ” grepped READMEs+INDEX: cymatics only *draw* membrane modes; Karplus is strings. **First playable membrane / non-linear modal synth in 280+ prototypes.** The pitches are Bessel eigenmodes (inharmonic, non-pentatonic by physics); the tension pitch-glide is the non-linear part of the research anchor.
- **(3) Named reference** вҖ” README cites **nlm (arXiv 2603.10240, 2026)** + **Rayleigh, *Theory of Sound* (1877)** + **Morrison & Rossing (tympani nonlinearity)**.
- **(2) вүҘ3 subsystems** вҖ” 4: multi-touch strike (position + pseudo-velocity) input В· per-strike Bessel-mode displacement on the three.js mesh (viz) В· 8-partial non-linear modal audio synth bank with per-mode decay + tension detune В· three.js render (lights, glow rings, always-on drone).
- **(5) Recent research** вҖ” built directly off this cycle's В§292 dive.

**Diversity audit** (last 10 committed by folder = 264,267,268,271,272,275,276,279,280,283):
`diversity: banned=[canvas2d-output(5Г—: 271,272,275,279,280) В· C-major-pentatonic(JURY)] В· picked=[touch-strike INPUT В· three.js OUTPUT В· non-linear modal membrane synthesis TECHNIQUE(0Г— ever) В· matte/organic kids VIBE В· JI-spread Bessel-eigenmode SOUND (non-pentatonic)]`
- **OUTPUT = three.js**: canvas2d hit **5Г—** (271,272,275,279,280) вҶ’ **BANNED**; three.js only 2Г— (267,283), SVG 2Г— (268,276), raw-WebGL 1Г— (264) вҖ” all under the line. All three briefs avoided canvas2d (284/285 three.js, 286 SVG).
- **INPUT**: no modality вүҘ4 (touch 3Г— [264,268,272], mic 3Г— [275,280,283], audio-file ~2Г—, tilt 1Г—, external-API 1Г—) вҶ’ touch is *under* the ban line at 3; chosen as the core 4-yo modality (last two kids inputs were tilt `276` + mic `280`, so touch rotates back in cleanly). The real diversification this cycle is the **sound engine**, which is the axis the JURY says nobody audits.
- **TECHNIQUE**: physical-modeling / modal synthesis = **0Г— ever** вҶ’ cleanest possible dodge.
- **VIBE**: kids 5Г— (264,268,272,276,280) вҶ’ forced (even cycle); diversified *inside* the kids zone via a wholly new synthesis method + new visual paradigm (membrane ripple).
- **SOUND** (the JURY's demanded axis): C-pentatonic вҶ’ **banned**; all three briefs forced non-pentatonic (Bessel eigenmodes / inharmonic bell partials / just intonation). Winner's pitches are physical eigenmodes вҖ” the deepest break.

**Orchestration**: spawned 3 Builder subagents in parallel (single message), folder-isolated (284/285/286 pre-allocated), each fully self-contained (per-object concept + algorithm; audio-visual-only / self-contained / degrade-gracefully constraints; the per-brief mandatory non-canvas2d output; KIDS design rules; typography rules; the exact GitHub design-notes URL; the build-trap list incl. unused-vars, `use*`-named-helper hook trap, un-disabled `any`, the `Uint8Array<ArrayBuffer>` getByte* cast trap, refs-not-state rAF, one-`useEffect` teardown; and the no-git / no-shared-docs limits). All three returned demoable + README, each self-reporting tsc+eslint clean (286's builder fixed an engine `useEffect` that depended on `[started,hint]` and tore down the whole audio graph when the hint faded вҖ” removed `hint` from deps; 285's builder noted a transient ENOENT during page-data that cleared on the clean re-run). I (Curator) gotcha-scanned all three (`"use client"` line 1 В· **no `getContext("2d")`** anywhere В· 284/285 `three`, 286 inline-SVG В· no `function use*` non-hook helpers В· no bare `any` В· each design-notes link points at its OWN README В· no API route), then ran the authoritative `npm run build` with **all three present** вҶ’ **exit 0** (honest banking: both losers genuinely compile + emit their routes вҖ” 285 `3.89 kB`), then picked the winner, `rm -rf`'d the two losers, and rebuilt winner-only вҶ’ **"вң“ Compiled successfully in 27.8s"**, `284-kids-thunder-drum в—Ӣ Static 3.69 kB`.

**Winner = `284-kids-thunder-drum`.** All three cleared the floor and dodged every banned tag; decider = **ambition Г— surprise Г— demo-reliability Г— directive-fit**:
- **Most demo-reliable at 06:30** вҖ” a satisfying boom on the *first tap* with zero gesture to learn. (285's signature *requires discovering* the circular-rub вҖ” a plain tap gives only a small strike вҖ” the same "wow needs a learned gesture/setup" risk that lost siblings in 282/289.)
- **Most novel / surprising SOUND + deepest JURY answer** вҖ” the only one using the *non-linear* half of the research anchor: the tension pitch-glide "bwooOOWww" is the cleanest "huh, I didn't know we could do that," and eigenmodes-not-a-scale is the deepest possible answer to "audit the sound."
- **Most visceral for a 4-yo** вҖ” drumming is the most primal kid instrument; three.js membrane-ripple ties the visual directly to the modal sound.
- Both runners-up **build-verified** (all-three build, exit 0) and banked number-free in IDEAS.md (`kids-singing-bowl` friction/stick-slip + `kids-jelly-choir` mass-spring soft-body).

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First playable physical-modeling / non-linear modal-synthesis instrument in 280+ prototypes** вҖ” the pitches are circular-membrane Bessel **eigenmodes** (inharmonic, non-pentatonic by physics), not a chosen scale.
2. **First tension pitch-glide** вҖ” strike velocity bends all partials sharp then relaxes them over 120вҖ“260 ms (the tympani/thunder-drum "bwooOOWww"); the non-linear part of the В§292 anchor.
3. **Strike position = timbre** вҖ” center hits excite low axisymmetric modes (round boom), rim hits the higher modes (bright slap), mirrored by a travelling rim-pinned membrane ripple that displaces the three.js mesh.
4. **Direct researchвҶ’build chain, same fire** вҖ” В§292's physical-modeling dive IS the winner's load-bearing idea, and it answers the JURY "audit the SOUND" mandate at the synthesis-method level (deeper than the recent tuning-only breaks at 272/276/280).

**Queued next**:
- Cycle 293: **adult build** (293 % 2 = 1). Resurrect a banked non-winner now that canvas2d should start to unban: **`281-midi-harmonograph`** (harmonograph + JI, pianist fit, raw-WebGL2 вҖ” canvas-free, shippable any cycle), **`282-ensemble-tabs`** (first networked piece), or **`mosaic-listener`** (first concatenative synthesis, canvas2d вҖ” wait for unban). OR the JURY's standing ask: **AI-image-INSIDE-an-AV-piece** (his stated #1, still 0Г— in 15) or **extend `259-paths-generative`** (long-form/memory). Avoid a 4th "fly through your music" + 5th emergent-CA (JURY-frozen).
- Cycle 294: **kids build**. Bank-resurrect a fresh physical-modeling sibling вҖ” **`kids-singing-bowl`** (friction/stick-slip, three.js) or **`kids-jelly-choir`** (mass-spring soft-body, SVG) вҖ” both build-verified this fire; or push physical modeling further (a **plate/Chladni *playable* instrument**, or a struck **metal tongue-drum**). Keep diversifying the SOUND; rotate input/output against whatever the audit bans that cycle.
- **DEEPEN 284 (multi-cycle)**: coupled-mode solver (energy exchange between partials вҶ’ truer transient); amplitude-dependent damping; a tympani-style "pitch pedal" drag-to-retune gesture; a shell/air-cavity resonance under the membrane. README lists the path.
- **Housekeeping (open since 269)**: STATE.md ordering is consistent at the top now (286/287/288/291/292 prepended) but cycles 280вҖ“285 + 289/290 still sit appended at the END; INDEX.md "Newest/Previous" chain skips some mid-200s + 279/280. Worth a reconcile in a polish cycle.

**Notes**:
- **No API route / no `guard` needed** вҖ” `284` is Web Audio + three.js, entirely client-side; no network, no mic, no camera, no server, no secrets. Within the scope fence (`src/app/dream/**` + `docs/dreams/**`). No new deps (three.js ^0.182 already installed).
- **WIDE-curation discipline held** вҖ” built **all 3 present first** (exit 0 вҖ” confirms both losers genuinely `в—Ӣ Static` + emit routes, so banking is honest) then winner-only (exit 0). Three folder-isolated builders wrote concurrently with zero conflict; none touched git or shared docs; I (orchestrator) alone committed. Loser folders 285/286 `rm -rf`'d, never committed вҶ’ free again; committed folder this cycle = **284** only.
- **Diversity audit was load-bearing** вҖ” it forced all three outputs off the over-represented canvas2d; the kids zone's monotony is the *sound*, so the WIDE fire put three never-used synthesis methods in play and shipped the one whose sound is most novel.
- **Honest carry-forward**: `284` is build-verified but not *browser-verified* live this fire. Risks (in README): (a) the per-strike modal voice is a sine bank, not a coupled-mode solver, so the attack transient is approximate (still reads as a struck skin); (b) "velocity" is derived from inter-tap timing / drag, not real pressure вҖ” a single deliberate tap reads as medium-hard, so the glide is always *present* but its dynamic range is coarse. Both fail safe: the always-on drone keeps it alive, and any tap produces an immediate satisfying boom.

## Cycle 288 вҖ” kids build (WIDE orchestration) вҖ” 276-kids-balloon-tritave

**When**: 2026-06-02 UTC (every-2h autonomous cycle).

**Git sync**: origin/main had been **force-updated** again (local main diverged 50/50 on fetch). Reset local `main --hard origin/main` вҶ’ HEAD `7a34357` (cycle 287, `275-memory-loom`). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` ABSENT вҶ’ `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative builds. Highest committed folder = 275; banked seed-names 273/274 reserve no numbers (folders rm'd, free) вҶ’ pre-allocated **276/277/278** for the three builders (no collision).

**Love signal** (`curl вҖҰ/api/dream/votes`, 32 loved): for a kids cycle the relevant pull is the **calm/contemplative + non-standard-instrument** cluster вҖ” `140-kids-string-bridge` вқӨпёҸ, `133-kids-ripple-pond` вқӨпёҸ, `166-kids-lantern` вқӨпёҸ, `105-pluck-field` вқӨпёҸ, `107-ocean-presence` вқӨпёҸ вҖ” plus the cut-paper/SVG register the lab leaned into at loved-adjacent `268-kids-shadow-theater`. The winner (a calm, matte tilt-and-drift balloon sky in an alien-but-consonant tuning) sits squarely in this quiet, parent-tolerable vein the KIDS.md market-gap analysis stakes out, not the high-energy tap-chime vein.

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH.md В§288, 2026-06-02 вҖ” web tools healthy): **non-octave tuning вҖ” the BohlenвҖ“Pierce scale**. Sources: Xenharmonic Wiki + Elaine Walker/ZIA + Wikipedia (BP independently discovered by **Heinz Bohlen 1972** and **Max Mathews & John R. Pierce**, Bell Labs ~1984); freshness anchor that it's a *live* scene not a museum piece: *"A huge online gallery of microtonal music to listen to"* (The Microtone Fox, **Medium, May 2026**) + Elaine Walker's forthcoming BP album; timbre cross-ref = the active 2025вҖ“2026 interactive-resonator literature. Surprise/hook: every pitched piece in 280+ prototypes вҖ” pentatonic, slendro, Hindustani JI, whole-tone вҖ” still repeats at the **2:1 octave**; BP throws the octave out, repeating at the **tritave (3:1)** in **13 equal steps** (`3^(1/13)вүҲ1.0882`, ~146Вў), engineered around odd-harmonic chords (the **3:5:7 triad**, clarinet affinity). It sounds in-tune yet alien вҖ” the purest "huh, I didn't know we could do that" sound the lab can offer, and a 4-year-old has no theory to unlearn. Chain today's research вҶ’ today's build is direct: В§288 вҶ’ WIDE brief A вҶ’ shipped `276-kids-balloon-tritave` (research-first rule path (a)).

**Decided**: Kids cycle (288 % 2 = 0). No blocker, nothing in-progress. - **(3) Named reference** вҖ” README cites the **BohlenвҖ“Pierce scale**: Heinz Bohlen (1972) + Max Mathews & John R. Pierce (Bell Labs ~1984) + Elaine Walker (ZIA), with the clarinet/odd-harmonic affinity.

Surprise/hook: the heavyweight 2026 frontier (latent-diffusion co-performance) needs a remote GPU and isn't browser-feasible, but the **memory architecture** under it runs zero-dep in Web Audio вҖ” and the cheapest version is the most personal: the instrument becomes literally *made of the player's own sound*. The literature offers three memory representations (verbatim audio / grain corpus / symbolic notes) вҶ’ became this cycle's DEEP fan-out. Chain today's research вҶ’ today's build is direct: В§287 вҶ’ DEEP brief A вҶ’ shipped `275-memory-loom` (research-first rule path (a)).

The JURY's (2026-06-02) two "massively bigger" adult asks were: (#1) build the AI-image-INSIDE-AV piece (answered cycle 285 by `271-pigment-mosaic`), and (the freshest) **"Extend 259, not 243 вҖ” fuse 259's incommensurate-loop state machine with his real Welcome Home recordings and the mic-listening intelligence proven in 251/256: a piece that *listens, remembers, and rewrites its own structure over 10 minutes.*"** Picked the latter вҖ” 259 is the JURY's named standout / "most important build in the window," and a piece that *listens & remembers* is brand-new (259 only played back).

**Mode**: **DEEP** (alternation: 285 DEEP вҶ’ 286 WIDE вҶ’ **287 DEEP**; and the JURY's "extend X / massively bigger" signal = go DEEP on X). One massive concept вҖ” *"a piece that LISTENS to you play, REMEMBERS what you played, and REWRITES its own structure over 10 min"* вҖ” attacked via **three different memory representations**:
- `275-memory-loom` вҖ” **verbatim audio capture** вҶ’ incommensurate loop bank + state machine (Frippertronics/Eno).
- `276-mosaic-listener` вҖ” **grain corpus** tagged by descriptors вҶ’ concatenative navigation (CataRT/MACataRT).
- `277-motif-memory` вҖ” **symbolic note transcription** вҶ’ Markov + transformational re-performance (Lewis *Voyager* / Rowe *Cypher*).

**Ambition floor** вҖ” winner cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-references + вүҘ3-subsystems + recent-research`
- **(1) Novel technique** вҖ” grepped INDEX + READMEs: loops existed (`172`) and granular (`227`), but **live audio-capture-into-the-loop-bank (recording you in real time) / a self-listening Frippertronics architecture has never appeared** in 270+ prototypes. First of its kind.
- **(3) Named references** вҖ” README cites **Eno & Fripp** *Frippertronics* / *(No Pussyfooting)* (1973) + *Music for Airports* (1978) and **Pauline Oliveros** *Deep Listening*.
- **(2) вүҘ3 subsystems** вҖ” 4 distinct: mic-capture listener (ring buffer + 2-threshold RMS onset/release phrase slicer) В· incommensurate 7-loop memory bank (per-voice LFO + transposition + pan + procedural convolution reverb + shared lowpass + limiter) В· long-form generative movement state machine (decaying-memory displacement) В· Canvas2D loom viz. Plus tri-modal source (mic/file/`/api/audio` track-id/synth).
- **(5) Recent research** вҖ” built directly off this cycle's В§287 dive.

**Diversity audit** (last 10 by cycle = 272,271,268,267,264,262,260,259,258,256):
`diversity: banned=[touch-input(4Г—: 272,268,264,260) В· kids-vibe(5Г—: 272,268,264,260,258)] В· picked=[mic + audio-file input В· canvas2d output В· live-capture-looping + generative-state-machine technique В· ambient/long-form adult-meditative vibe]`
- INPUT: touch Г—4 вҶ’ **BANNED** (winner uses mic + audio-file, both under the line). OUTPUT: canvas2d Г—3 (272,271,259), three.js Г—2, raw-WebGL Г—2 вҖ” none вүҘ4, canvas2d chosen (continues rebalancing off the JURY-flagged three.js glut). TECHNIQUE: FFT-spectral Г—2, kids-CA Г—2 вҖ” none вүҘ4. VIBE: kids Г—5 вҶ’ **BANNED** (adult cycle avoids cleanly); cosmic Г—3.
- All three briefs were adult / mic+audio-file / canvas2d вҶ’ dodged both banned tags cleanly. The winner is also the most JURY-aligned (it literally *is* the "extend 259 вҶ’ listens, remembers, rewrites over 10 min" ask).

**Orchestration**: spawned 3 Builder subagents in parallel (single message), folder-isolated (275/276/277 pre-allocated), each fully briefed with constraints + typography rules + Canvas2D + the exact `/api/audio/:id` fetch pattern + the exact GitHub README URL + no-git/no-shared-docs limits. All three returned demoable + README, each self-reporting tsc+eslint clean. I (Curator) gotcha-scanned all three (no three.js/WebGL/additive-blend вҖ” 275's only "three" match was a code comment; no `use*` helpers; `"use client"` first line; correct GitHub README link; `as any` properly eslint-disabled in 277; no API route created), then ran the authoritative `npm run build` with **all three present** вҶ’ exit 0, "вң“ Compiled successfully", all three `в—Ӣ Static` (275 5.51 kB В· 276 5.73 kB В· 277 6.62 kB) вҶ’ all three genuinely **build-verified** вҖ” then picked the winner, `rm -rf`'d the two losers, and rebuilt winner-only (exit 0, "вң“ Compiled in 35.8s", `275-memory-loom` `в—Ӣ Static` **5.51 kB**).

**Winner = `275-memory-loom`.** Reasoning: (1) **Bullseye of the JURY's #1 adult ask** вҖ” it reuses 259's *exact* incommensurate-loop engine and adds the mic-listening capture, so it IS "fuse 259 + listen + remember + rewrite over 10 min," almost verbatim. (2) **Strongest love + directive alignment** вҖ” by keeping the *raw audio*, the room is literally built from Karel's own piano sound, sitting dead-center on the loved 163/227/172/259 cluster and his standing "use the real recordings" directive (the other two abstract the sound into grains/symbols). (3) **Demo-reliable** вҖ” no fragile pitch detection (277's monophonic-detection risk; 276 is also robust but more abstract); the D-dorian pad means it's never silent even before you play. (4) **Novel** вҖ” first live-capture / self-listening Frippertronics architecture in the lab. 276 (first concatenative synthesis вҖ” highest *pure* novelty) and 277 (symbolic *Voyager* partner) banked build-verified in IDEAS.md.

**What I built/shipped**:
- `src/app/dream/275-memory-loom/page.tsx` вҖ” a self-listening Frippertronics room. A muted mic tap вҶ’ `ScriptProcessor`(4096) вҶ’ smoothed RMS вҶ’ 8 s rolling **ring buffer**; a two-threshold onset/release detector marks phrase boundaries (4.5 s cap, 0.6 s floor) and on phrase-end slices the recent audio out of the ring, peak-normalizes, end-fades for loopability, and banks it. Up to **7 verbatim phrase loops**, each a looping `AudioBufferSourceNode` with consonant `playbackRate` transposition (octave/5th/4th/M3/unison), stereo pan, and an incommensurate gain-LFO (0.041вҖ“0.127 Hz); a separate incommensurate playhead rate (0.131вҖ“0.257) drives the visual sweep; full bank вҶ’ **oldest memory decays out** (demo seeds first, then by capture time). A generative **movement state machine** every 60вҖ“130 s random-walks the active set (3вҖ“5 voices, 2.5 s in / 4.5 s out crossfades via `setTargetAtTime`), transpositions, density, lowpass cutoff (900вҖ“4100 Hz), and reverb wet/dry. Signal chain: per-voice вҶ’ shared lowpass вҶ’ dry + procedural-IR convolution reverb wet вҶ’ `DynamicsCompressor` limiter вҶ’ destination (never clips/silent). Tri-modal source: **mic** В· **file-drop** В· **Welcome Home track-id** вҶ’ read-only `fetch('/api/audio/:id')` (JSON-`{url}`-or-raw-bytes) В· always-on **D-dorian** synth demo pad (non-pentatonic). Canvas2D **loom**: per-phrase lanes (waveform + incommensurate playhead + gain-brightness + warm/amber hue + `captured Nm ago` label), capture flash, live input RMS meter, HUD (elapsed / movement # / active-total voices / source). Full teardown (sources stopped, rAF cancelled, mic tracks stopped, `audioCtx.close()`). Typography rules followed.
- `src/app/dream/275-memory-loom/README.md` вҖ” concept; what's novel (keeps raw audio, not features); 4 subsystems; signal-chain diagram; state-machine table; degradation table; named refs (Eno/Fripp + Oliveros); honest limits (deprecated `ScriptProcessor` main-thread capture, RMS-only onset, naive normalization, `playbackRate` couples pitch+duration, sources not monitored dry); next-cycle deepening (AudioWorklet + spectral-flux onset, pitch-preserving transposition, regenerative feedback-delay tape path, persistent/exportable memory, steerable movements).
- Banked both build-verified non-winners as seeds in IDEAS.md and `rm -rf`'d their folders (never committed, per orchestration safety): **`mosaic-listener`** (CataRT/MACataRT grain-corpus concatenative synthesis вҖ” the lab's **first concatenative synthesis**, the strongest single novelty bank; queued for the next clean-slate adult cycle) and **`motif-memory`** (autocorrelation pitch-transcription вҶ’ symbolic Markov/transformational re-performance, the Lewis *Voyager* / Rowe *Cypher* lineage вҖ” most musically-literate, extends loved `256`). Appended RESEARCH В§287. Updated INDEX Newest. Rewrote MORNING.md.

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First time the lab records YOU in real time and plays you back as the instrument.** Not a visualizer, not file playback вҖ” a live self-listening loop. The instrument becomes made of your own sound.
2. **The most literal extension of loved 259 + Karel's "use his real recordings" directive** вҖ” same incommensurate-loop engine, but it *listens* and *remembers*, and keeps the raw piano sound.
3. **Brings the self-listening-agent architecture (MACAT/CataRT) into the lab via its cheapest, most personal form** вҖ” zero deps, zero latency, browser-native, where the 2026 GPU frontier can't reach.
4. **DEEP shipped the most JURY-aligned of three memory representations**, banking the lab's first concatenative-synthesis piece and a symbolic *Voyager* partner вҖ” two more fresh techniques queued.

**Queued next**:
- Cycle 288: **kids build** (288 % 2 = 0). MUST be orchestrated. Ship banked **`274-kids-clay-clock`** (the West-African 2:3:4 + gankogui polyrhythm opener вҖ” a brand-new kids SOUND, build-verified cycle 286) to keep diversifying the kids sound axis. Hold `273-kids-raga-peacock` вүҘ1 more kids cycle from `268`'s similar non-Western/cut-paper aesthetic.
- Cycle 289: **adult build** вҖ” ship banked **`mosaic-listener`** (the lab's first concatenative synthesis вҖ” newest technique, highest novelty), OR **DEEPEN 275** (pitch-preserving granular/phase-vocoder transposition, regenerative feedback-delay tape path, persistent/exportable/steerable memory вҖ” its README lists the path; a loved-cluster piece worth 2вҖ“3 cycles).

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH.md В§286, 2026-06-02): re-grounded the **psychoacoustics of consonance/roughness** вҖ” the modern *three-term* model (harmonicity + dislike of fast beats + liking of slow beats), synthesized in McBride's roughness review (arXiv **2510.14159**, Oct 2025) and the timbral-effects-on-consonance work (235k human judgments). Verified-fresh last-30-day anchor: **Live Music Diffusion Models** (arXiv **2605.22717**, May 2026). The surprise/hook: the roughnessвҶ’consonance transition (audible beats at 5вҖ“8 Hz feel "rough," resolving to 0 Hz feels "pure") is a *physical, embodied, pre-verbal* phenomenon a 4-year-old can feel вҖ” "could become a prototype where a child drags a detuned creature until the beating stops and it locks into just intonation." Chain today's research вҶ’ today's build is direct: В§286 вҶ’ brief A вҶ’ shipped `272-kids-tune-purr` (research-first rule path (a)).

**Decided**: Kids cycle (286 % 2 = 0). No blocker, nothing in-progress. Clean slate. JURY.md (2026-06-02) is a **"ban these tags" verdict** (ban the glow / three.js additive-points + ban C-major pentatonic for one cycle; force a non-luminous output in a non-pentatonic mode; **audit the SOUND вҖ” the lab's most monotonous axis**) вҶ’ AGENT.md says that signal = go **WIDE** with fresh tags. So WIDE, three *different non-luminous, non-pentatonic sound worlds*.

**Mode**: **WIDE** (alternation: 285 DEEP вҶ’ **286 WIDE**; and the JURY "ban X" signal mandates WIDE). Three briefs, three unrelated sound worlds, all matte/non-luminous + non-pentatonic:
- `272-kids-tune-purr` вҖ” drag-to-tune В· canvas2d matte В· **audible just-intonation beating that resolves** В· contemplative drone.
- `273-kids-raga-peacock` вҖ” tap+meend-glide В· SVG cut-paper В· **tanpura drone + heptatonic Raga Yaman in just intonation** В· warm Hindustani.
- `274-kids-clay-clock` вҖ” tap-to-add В· canvas2d matte clay В· **interlocking 2:3:4 + gankogui polyrhythm** (two-clock scheduler) В· West-African percussion.

**Ambition floor** вҖ” winner cleared **3 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: novel-technique + named-references + recent-research`
- **(1) Novel technique** вҖ” grepped INDEX + READMEs: the lab has had pluck/granular/loops, but **never audible acoustic beating used as the interaction** вҖ” JI interval-locking where the child resolves roughnessвҶ’consonance by ear. First of its kind here.
- **(3) Named references** вҖ” README cites **Helmholtz** *On the Sensations of Tone* (beats/roughness) + the **McBride 2025 roughness review** (arXiv 2510.14159) three-term consonance model + Parncutt & Hair.
- **(5) Recent research** вҖ” built directly off this cycle's В§286 dive (the consonance/roughness model + the verified-fresh LMDM anchor).

All three of this cycle's briefs were forced **non-luminous + non-pentatonic**, attacking both directly. I (Curator) gotcha-scanned all three (no three.js/WebGL/additive-blend, no `use*` helpers, no bare `any`, `"use client"` first line, correct GitHub README link), then ran the authoritative `npm run build` with **all three present** вҶ’ exit 0, "вң“ Compiled successfully in 26.2s", all three `в—Ӣ Static` (272 3.93 kB В· 273 4.31 kB В· 274 4.66 kB) вҶ’ all three genuinely **build-verified** вҖ” then picked the winner, `rm -rf`'d the two losers, and rebuilt winner-only (exit 0, "вң“ Compiled in 27.8s", `272-kids-tune-purr` `в—Ӣ Static` **3.93 kB**).

**Winner = `272-kids-tune-purr`.** Reasoning: (1) **Bullseye of today's JURY** вҖ” it literally implements "a dissonance that resolves" (the verdict's exact phrase for the non-pentatonic ask) and is the loudest answer to "audit the sound вҖ” nobody is watching it." (2) **Highest novelty** вҖ” first audible-beating / JI-interval-lock interaction in 270+ prototypes; teaches consonance/tension-release pre-verbally. (3) **Fills the named KIDS.md gap** вҖ” the calm, "parent-tolerable," contemplative option (the kids market is loud; this is the quiet one) and aligns with the loved calm/ambient cluster. (4) **Demo-reliable** вҖ” the drone + 3 creatures are alive on first touch; no input/permissions/network; never silent.

**What I built/shipped**:
- `src/app/dream/272-kids-tune-purr/page.tsx` вҖ” a warm **110 Hz drone** + **3 matte "hummer" creatures** (116 px drag targets) on a deep-dusk matte canvas. Each creature starts **5.5вҖ“7 Hz detuned** from a pure JI target against the drone (unison 1:1, major third 5:4, perfect fifth 3:2) вҶ’ genuine **acoustic beating** you hear *and see* (the creature shivers at the beat rate, reinforced by a beat-frequency LFO AM). Dragging Y changes pitch continuously; the beat slows as you near the ratio; within **Вұ6 cents** it **snaps into tune** вҖ” shivering stops, eyes open, smile, a soft **purr** fades in. Lock all 3 вҶ’ a pure **4:5:6 just-intonation major triad** + a matte ring-wave celebration. Fully reversible, no score, no fail. Pointer Events + `setPointerCapture` + `touch-none`; AudioContext unlocks on first gesture; all gains via `setTargetAtTime` (click-free, toddler-safe, nothing above 350 Hz); full rAF + `AudioContext.close()` teardown. **No three.js/WebGL, no additive blending вҖ” true drop-shadows only.**
- `src/app/dream/272-kids-tune-purr/README.md` вҖ” concept; JI ratio + beat-math table (4:5:6); sound design; visual-state map; degradation; named refs (Helmholtz + McBride 2510.14159 + Parncutt & Hair); honest limits (LFO-AM phase drift, Вұ170-cent drag clamp, monophonic purr); next-cycle deepening (haptics on lock, ring-mod for phase-coherent beats, 4th creature on the 4:3, visual interference-waveform trace).
- Banked both build-verified non-winners as seeds in IDEAS.md and `rm -rf`'d their folders (never committed, per orchestration safety): **`273-kids-raga-peacock`** (tanpura drone + Raga Yaman just-intonation + meend glide, SVG cut-paper вҖ” *deliberately deferred*: its non-Western-tuning + matte-cut-paper aesthetic sits too close to last kids cycle's `268-kids-shadow-theater`; bank for spacing) and **`274-kids-clay-clock`** (first true cross-rhythm/polyrhythm kids toy: 2:3:4 + 12/8 gankogui bell on a Chris-Wilson two-clock look-ahead scheduler, matte clay, percussion-only). Appended RESEARCH В§286. Updated INDEX Newest. Rewrote MORNING.md. Added a KIDS.md "what's been built" row.

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First time audible acoustic beating is the instrument.** Not a visualizer of sound вҖ” the child *resolves roughness into consonance* with their hand, by ear. The lab's first piece about tuning/intonation itself.
2. **Answers the JURY's two un-audited over-used axes at once** вҖ” non-luminous (matte) AND non-pentatonic (pure JI ratios over a drone), the two tags the rolling-10 audit kept missing.
3. **Brings real psychoacoustics into the kids zone** вҖ” the roughnessвҶ’consonance three-term model (Helmholtz вҶ’ McBride 2025) made playable for a 4-year-old.
4. **WIDE shipped the most JURY-aligned of three fresh non-pentatonic sound worlds**, banking a Hindustani-raga piece and a West-African-polyrhythm piece both build-verified вҖ” two more brand-new kids sound palettes queued.

**Queued next**:

Both are explicit JURY "massively bigger" asks.

## Cycle 277 вҖ” adult build (DEEP orchestration) вҖ” 256-live-duet-harmonist

**When**: 2026-06-02 UTC (every-2h autonomous cycle)

**Git sync**: Fast-forwarded main to a9d779f (cycle 276, `253-kids-tilt-pour`; +38 commits). Worked directly on main. `node_modules` was ABSENT вҶ’ ran `npm ci` (exit 0) before the authoritative builds.

**Love signal** (32 loved; unchanged set this fire): the pull is the **chord/responsive-duet** cluster вҖ” `251-live-duet-trader` вқӨпёҸ (the melodic sibling, loved last review) + `229-chord-canvas` вқӨпёҸ (loved chromaвҶ’chord naming) + the broad orchestration-era love wave (`243`/`236`/`234` вқӨпёҸ). Karel loving 251 directly is the green light to ship its harmony counterpart вҖ” the polyphonic half of the same "AI band."

**Research-first dive** (mandate; RESEARCH.md В§277, 2026-06-02): **ReaLchords** (Lee et al., arXiv 2506.14723, **v1 17 Jun 2025**, date verified via WebFetch) вҖ” an *online* model emitting chord accompaniment **simultaneously** with an unfolding monophonic melody, max-likelihood-pretrained then **RL-refined against a reward that scores harmonic AND temporal coherency separately** (+ teacher distillation from a future-aware model). The reusable insight: accompaniment quality is two independent axes (right notes / right time), which maps exactly onto a DSP accompanist's two failure modes. Slightly older than the 30-day window but **foundational** for the harmony-member design and a perfect named reference. Recent anchor remains arXiv 2604.07612 (Apr 2026) from the cycle-275 dive that seeded this whole family.

**Decided**: Adult cycle (277 % 2 = 1). No blocker, nothing in-progress. **This is a multi-cycle continuation** (research-first rule path (b)/(c)): the "AI band you play with" arc вҖ” `251-live-duet-trader` shipped cycle 275; this cycle ships its **harmony member**, the banked build-verified `live-duet-harmonist`. Explicitly the queued-next from cycle 276 STATE and a JURY.md ask (extend the reactive-accompaniment thread, don't seed yet another idea).

**Ambition floor** вҖ” winner cleared **4 of 5** (need 2): `ambition: recent-research-anchor + named-references + вүҘ3-subsystems + novel-technique`
- **(5) Recent research** вҖ” built off the cycle-275 dive's arXiv 2604.07612 (Apr 2026) anchor that seeded the whole live-duet family + this cycle's В§277 ReaLchords cite.
- **(3) Named references** вҖ” README cites ReaLchords (2506.14723) + arXiv 2604.07612 + Chris Wilson *A Tale of Two Clocks* + Mark Levine *The Jazz Piano Book*.
- **(2) вүҘ3 subsystems** вҖ” 4 distinct: chromaвҶ’36-template chord/quality detection В· jazz voicing engine (rootless/drop-2 + nearest-pitch voice-leading) + walking bass В· spectral-flux onset/tempo inference В· Chris-Wilson two-clocks look-ahead scheduler (+ Web Audio synth bed w/ feedback-delay + limiter).
- **(1) Novel technique** вҖ” **first spectral-flux onset/tempo inference + two-clocks look-ahead scheduler in the lab** (the banked groover seed proposed beat-tracking but was never built; this is the first realization), and the first to fuse it *with* live harmony.

**Diversity audit** (last 10 = 234,236,238,243,244,246,248,251,253 + 233):
`diversity: banned=[three.js-output В· kids-vibe] В· picked=[mic input В· canvas2d output В· chromaвҶ’chord + jazz-voicing/onset-sync technique В· adult jazz/responsive vibe]`
- OUTPUT tallies: **three.js вүҘ6** (234,236,238,243,244,246) вҶ’ BANNED. raw-WebGL = 2 (248,253); canvas2d = 2 (233,251). VIBE: **kids = 5** (234,238,244,248,253) вҶ’ BANNED for an adult cycle anyway. INPUT: mic/voice ~4 (243,244,251 + this) вҖ” note: mic is climbing; acceptable here because it's the necessary input for a live accompanist and the OUTPUT (canvas2d, under-represented) + technique are fresh.
- 256 uses **canvas2d** (under-represented, helps rebalance away from the three.js glut JURY flagged) + **mic** + a technique stack the lab has never shipped. Dodges both banned tags cleanly.

**Mode**: **DEEP** (alternation: 275 DEEP вҶ’ 276 WIDE вҶ’ **277 DEEP**). The target is a single named banked concept (the harmony member), so DEEP вҖ” one concept, two technical approaches in parallel вҖ” is correct over WIDE. Two briefs attacked the same "live comping harmonist" via different voicing/timing engines:
- `250-live-duet-harmonist` вҖ” the canonical banked design: fixed-72-BPM eighth-note arpeggiated **triad** comping, nearest-octave voice leading, max demo-reliability.
- `256-live-duet-harmonist` вҖ” a **jazz** variant: rootless/drop-2 voicings + walking bass + **onset-synced** comping on a two-clocks scheduler (folds the seed's own "next-cycle deepening" into the shipped piece).

**Orchestration**: spawned 2 Builder subagents in parallel (single message), folder-isolated (250/256 pre-allocated), each fully briefed, told NOT to run git or touch shared docs. Both returned demoable + README, each self-reporting eslint+tsc clean. I (Curator) ran the authoritative `npm run build` with **both present** вҶ’ exit 0, "вң“ Compiled successfully", both routes `в—Ӣ Static` (250 4.23 kB В· 256 5.63 kB) вҖ” so both are genuinely **build-verified** вҖ” then picked the winner, `rm -rf`'d the loser, and rebuilt winner-only (exit 0, `256-live-duet-harmonist` `в—Ӣ Static` **5.63 kB**).

**Winner = `256-live-duet-harmonist`.** Reasoning: (1) **Higher ambition floor** вҖ” clears 4/5 vs 250's 3/5; it brings genuinely new DSP (spectral-flux onset/tempo + two-clocks scheduler) the lab has never had, fused with harmony. (2) **Bigger concept per the mandate** ("massively bigger concepts / bigger is fine") вҖ” it folds the seed's *own* deepening list (rootless/drop-2 voicings, walking bass, onset-synced comping) into the shipped piece instead of leaving them for "next cycle"; the result reads as a jazz trio, not a pad. (3) **More surprise** вҖ” "a comping bed that locks to the rhythm of your playing, not a metronome" is the line that makes Karel lean in. (4) **Degrades gracefully** вҖ” the onset-sync risk (spectral flux is weak on legato piano вҖ” the groover caveat) is contained: sparse onsets fall back to 80 BPM and the jazz voicings don't depend on tempo accuracy, and the demo path is a deterministic iiвҖ“VвҖ“IвҖ“vi at 88 BPM. The runner-up **`250` is banked build-verified** in IDEAS.md as `live-duet-harmonist-simple` вҖ” the more demo-reliable fixed-clock version; resurrect/ship it as a "safe mode" if 256's tempo-sync proves flaky in a real browser session.

**Authoritative build**: winner-only `npm run build` вҶ’ exit 0, "вң“ Compiled successfully in 34.7s", `/dream/256-live-duet-harmonist` `в—Ӣ Static` **5.63 kB**.

**What I built/shipped**:
- `src/app/dream/256-live-duet-harmonist/page.tsx` вҖ” mic вҶ’ AnalyserNode(4096) вҶ’ 12-bin chroma (60вҖ“2000 Hz, one-pole 0.8) вҶ’ cosine-match 36 weighted templates (maj/min/dom7, shell-weighted) вҶ’ 160 ms settle latch вҶ’ **rootless/drop-2 jazz voicing engine** (3+7 shell + 9/13 color, nearest-pitch `setTargetAtTime` voice leading) + **walking bass** (root/5/3/chromatic-approach across the bar) вҶ’ **spectral-flux onsets** (adaptive `mean+1.5В·std`, 100 ms refractory) вҶ’ median-IOI tempo (folded 60вҖ“180, 80 BPM fallback) вҶ’ **Chris-Wilson two-clocks scheduler** (25 ms tick / 100 ms window, exact AudioContext times) placing bass + comp stabs on the inferred pulse. Bed breathes with input energy over a quiet floor; feedback delay + DynamicsCompressor limiter. Canvas-2D: chroma ring, root-hued chord name + quality, voicing node arc, walking-bass ladder, 4-beat pulse + onset-flash + BPM, duration-weighted chord-history trail. No-mic вҶ’ Dm7вҶ’G7вҶ’Cmaj7вҶ’Am7 @88 BPM with full bass+comp + `text-rose-300` notice + retry. Full rAF/scheduler/mic/AudioContext cleanup on unmount. Typography rules followed.
- `src/app/dream/256-live-duet-harmonist/README.md` вҖ” concept; full pipeline with chosen params + WHY; voicing table per quality; colorвҶ”root table; degradation; named references (ReaLchords + 2604.07612 + Chris Wilson + Levine); honest limitations (inversion/bass-blind chroma, loose pulse not a beat tracker, 3 qualities only); next-cycle deepening (bass-aware detection, richer template bank, true DP beat tracker, Hungarian voice-leading, trade hand-off with 251).
- Banked `250-live-duet-harmonist` as build-verified fallback seed `live-duet-harmonist-simple` in IDEAS.md; `rm -rf`'d its folder (never committed, per orchestration safety). Marked the original `live-duet-harmonist` seed SHIPPED. Appended RESEARCH В§277. Added INDEX Newest section. Rewrote MORNING.md.

**What's new about this prototype**:
1. **First reactive comping engine in the lab.** `229-chord-canvas` вқӨпёҸ *names* your chords; this one *plays under them* with voiced harmony вҖ” a living harmonic bed, not a label.
2. **First spectral-flux onset/tempo inference + two-clocks look-ahead scheduler**, and the first to drive harmony off it вҖ” the bed locks to your pulse instead of a fixed clock.
3. **Completes the duet's polyphonic half.** 251 (melodic, monophonic) + 256 (chordal, polyphonic) now cover both how a pianist plays вҖ” the "AI band" arc is two members deep (groover banked = the third).
4. **Orchestration shipped the more ambitious of two parallel approaches**, banking the safer one build-verified вҖ” the critic chose ambition with a documented fallback, exactly the studio choreography Karel is building toward.

**Queued next**:
- Cycle 278: **kids build** (278 % 2 = 0). MUST be orchestrated (JURY: never solo вҖ” regresses to the tap-chime) and dodge the still-banned three.js + touch+canvas2d+pentatonic kids template via non-touch input. Build-verified banked candidates: `254-kids-blow-bloom` (breath/blow input вҖ” highest surprise, fresh) or `255-kids-sing-garden` (voiceвҶ’bedtime sky вҖ” hold until `244` breathes; swap in YIN/MPM first). Run WIDE for fresh tags or DEEP-resurrect a banked one.
- Cycle 279: **adult build** вҖ” ship the **third band member** `live-duet-groover` (drums/tempo, build-verified, ~728 lines) so the trio is complete (harmony 256 + melody 251 + rhythm). Caveat: needs a real-browser session to tune its flux floor; same applies to 256's tempo-sync вҖ” a one-off "tune the live-duet family by ear" polish cycle is worth scheduling once Karel can sit with them.
- **Housekeeping flag (open since 269)**: INDEX.md still missing detailed entries for 230вҖ“232, 236, 238, 243 вҖ” worth a polish cycle to reconcile.

**Notes**:

- DEEP-curation discipline held: built **both present** first (exit 0 вҖ” confirms the banked loser genuinely compiles, so "build-verified" is honest) then winner-only. Two folder-isolated builders wrote concurrently with zero conflict; neither touched git or shared docs; I (orchestrator) alone committed. Its key surprise is the *sliding-window look-ahead* co-performance protocol: the AI accompanist acts on **partial** context (predicts/settles ahead) with **latency as the binding constraint**, and a MAX/MSPвҶ”Python split keeps the real-time front end decoupled from the heavy model. **Chain today's research вҶ’ today's build is direct: В§275 вҶ’ the live-duet family вҶ’ `251-live-duet-trader`.**

- **(2) вүҘ3 subsystems** вҖ” 4 distinct: mic capture + NSDF/McLeod autocorrelation pitch detection (onset/gap tracking) В· live-trained 1st-order Markov interval generator + key inference from a pitch-class histogram В· gap-triggered fill generator with duck-on-re-entry В· Web Audio synthesis (warm additive partner voice + feedback-delay + low pad) + Canvas-2D split piano-roll.
- (Brushes (1) novel-technique too: continuous **interleaved** trading with duck-on-re-entry is a genuinely new interaction in the lab вҖ” `225-aria-companion` is fixed-2s turn-taking, not interleaved.)

`diversity: banned=[three.js/WebGL-output В· kids-vibe] В· picked=[mic-input В· canvas2d-output В· real-time-onset/gap+Markov-technique В· jazz/responsive-duet-vibe]`
